title: Caramelized Malaysian Chicken Stir-fry
description: A rich and flaky dish featuring chicken thighs cooked in a sweet caramel sauce that's raw-friendly.

ingredients.name: Vegetables (optional)
ingredients.amount: To taste - use of your choice

instructions: In a wok or large frying pan, heat oil over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and chopped onion to the hot oil and cook until fragrant.
Add chicken thighs and cook for about 5 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Stir in galangal, soy sauce, fish sauce, kecap manis, and water. Bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, stir in cornstarch, and let it thicken into a smooth caramelized sauce.
Add vegetables if using (e.g., bell peppers, mushrooms) and cook for another 2-3 minutes until wilted.
Stir occasionally until chicken is fully cooked through and the sauce has thickened to your desired consistency.
Serve hot with steamed rice or noodles.
